reasoning: Based on the Wikipedia page on Feb 1, 2026, Koneru Humpy is ranked 6th (tied in rating with 5th place Tan Zhongyi at 2535), with Goryachkina closely behind in 7th at 2534. For the first resolution date (Feb 8), FIDE only updates rankings monthly on the 1st, so Wikipedia will definitively still reflect the Feb 1 rankings. Therefore, her ranking is almost certain to remain exactly 6. For the second date (Mar 3), the new March 1 FIDE list will be published. Many top players tend to limit classical play right before the Candidates Tournament (which occurs in April or later), often resulting in unchanged ratings across February. Even if active, Goryachkina must gain points to overtake her, while Tan Zhongyi dropping points would push Humpy up. Due to the tight clustering (1 point gap to 7th, 0 point gap to 5th), there is a moderate risk of rank change, but retaining a top-6 position is the most likely outcome.
